description: Roleplay prompt: Linux monitoring single html
template: Please create a single fully functional HTML monitoring HTML, for a linux ubuntu latest edition Linux ubuntu-MacBookPro12-1 6.14.0-37-generic #37~24.04.1-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu Nov 20 10:25:38 UTC 2 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux on a macbook 12-1 running vscod via ssh from windows vscode. Docker is installed on linux and containers running, I also want the disk IO throughputs of total, read and write in same graph. Use the latest react version components for premium graphing. refreshrates must be 1 3 5 10 secs option, and light theme with Quicksand 400 minum, the design must be modern sopisticated and clean.
